description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On January 14, 2026 at 3:40 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving an SUV on Gough Street at Turk Street. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southbound in the leftmost lane on Gough Street when it slowed to a stop before entering the intersection 
with Turk Street on a green light, perceiving that there may be insufficient room to proceed fully through the intersection without blocking 
it. While the Waymo AV was waiting for traffic ahead to clear, the light turned yellow and an SUV traveling directly behind the Waymo 
AV proceeded to pass the Waymo AV on the left. As the SUV was passing the Waymo AV along the curb, the right side of the SUV made 
contact with the rear left side of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in 
autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
